desc:
Vault 76 is a control vault in the Fallout universe, meaning it was not supposed to have any secret experiments like other vaults. Its purpose was to house 500 people to help rebuild the world after the nuclear war, with residents emerging 25 years after the war began on Reclamation Day to recolonize Appalachia. It is the starting location for the game Fallout 76, which is set in the Appalachia region of West Virginia.
Grid D7 (X: 1317, Y: 2698)
